summary: [UI] Cluster pool - cluster claim button not re-positioned properly when zooming in/out on the cluster pool page
description: When zooming in or out on the cluster pool page, the cluster claim button does not reposition itself properly, resulting in a layout issue.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Navigate to Infrastructure → Clusters → Cluster pools
Select a specific cluster pool to view its details page
Verify cluster claim button is properly positioned (baseline)

expected_result: At all zoom levels, the cluster claim button should maintain proper alignment and positioning relative to other UI elements. The button should remain accessible and fully visible. Layout should be responsive and adapt to zoom changes without visual artifacts or overlap.
actual_result: The cluster claim button is not re-positioned properly when zooming in/out, causing misalignment or layout issues. Button may overlap other UI elements, be positioned outside the viewport, or show inconsistent alignment.
failure_criteria: Button is positioned outside the viewport
Button alignment is inconsistent with the overall page layout
Visual artifacts appear around the button when zooming
preconditions: At least one cluster pool created
Access to the cluster pool page
validation_approach: AI-powered browser automation with multi-zoom screenshot capture
elements_to_validate: Button positioning relative to cluster pool details
